iteration_01.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production 2D side-view game character animation source sheet
Primary request: Create exactly one 4 columns x 2 rows sheet with eight chronological full-body poses of the same V61/V64 male survivor. He faces shore/right in every cell. Top row: cling load, wave load, recover, look toward shore. In all four top-row poses his rear/left hand grips one fixed invisible stern contact extending behind him to screen-left while his complete body is dragged to screen-right. Bottom row: release, push off, swim blend, and the approved right-facing horizontal swim endpoint. Preserve tied dark hair, salt-worn gray-beige hooded coat, wraps, trousers and both wrapped boots. Keep full legs and boots in every cell.
Composition: equal cells, one complete isolated figure per cell, generous empty space, no overlap, no crop, no text or dividers.
Backdrop: perfectly flat #ff00ff.
Forbidden: boat, wreck, water, foam, splash, rope, props, weapons, backpack, missing lower body, three-quarter view, 180-degree turn or colorful patches.

selected_edit.prompt: Preserve the entire selected sheet and every pose except the top-row third pose. In that pose only, restore a clearly visible rear/left arm and hand extending backward to screen-left so it visibly holds the same invisible fixed stern contact as the other three top-row poses. Preserve strict right-facing profile, full legs and boots, exact identity, scale, spacing, flat #ff00ff backdrop, and all other pixels/composition as closely as possible. Add no boat, water, rope, prop, text or separator.
